title: Optimizing Web Font Loading for Superior UI/UX with CSS
tweet: Boost your website's performance and user experience! Learn how to optimize web font loading with `font-display: swap` to prevent layout shifts and ensure crisp text rendering from the start. #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UIDesign #UXTips
tip: To drastically improve perceived performance and prevent 'Flash of Invisible Text' (FOIT) or 'Flash of Unstyled Text' (FOUT), always include `font-display: swap;` in your `@font-face` declarations. This instructs the browser to use a fallback font immediately while the custom web font loads, then swap it in once available, ensuring content is readable sooner and minimizing Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS).
